prose.en: Perform security checks {param:pe-03.02_odp} at the physical perimeter of the facility or system for exfiltration of information or removal of system components.

guidance.en: Organizations determine the extent, frequency, and/or randomness of security checks to adequately mitigate risk associated with exfiltration.

prose.en: security checks are performed {param:pe-03.02_odp} at the physical perimeter of the facility or system for exfiltration of information or removal of system components.

objects.en: physical access control logs or records
Organizational personnel with physical access control responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for physical access control to the facility and/or system
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing physical access control for the facility or system
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing security checks for the unauthorized exfiltration of information

guidelines.en: the frequency at which to perform security checks at the physical perimeter of the facility or system for exfiltration of information or removal of system components is defined;
